more.title: How the Skeleton of Mutapa Times is Based on Sarah Charlesworth's Work
more.description: Conceptual artist Sarah Charlesworth's 1979 study of how newspapers covered a solar eclipse inspired the framework behind The Mutapa Times.

more.description: HARARE – While the Zimbabwe African National Union-Patriotic Front (ZANU PF) presents a united front in public regarding the 2030 agenda, the corridors of the Politburo are echoing with whispers of betrayal. more.title: Telecel Seeks Investors Under Corporate Rescue as Market Share Collapses
more.description: HARARE – Telecel Zimbabwe has been put up for potential investment under a corporate rescue process, as efforts intensify to revive the struggling telecoms firm whose market presence has sharply declined over the years. Grant Thornton, acting as transaction advisor and corporate rescue facilitator, has invited interested investors to participate in the recapitalisation of the [...] The post Telecel Seeks Investors Under Corporate Rescue as Market Share Collapses appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail .

more.title: US-China tech split deepens
more.description: The US Federal Communications Commission has voted unanimously to advance a proposal to bar all Chinese labs from testing electronic devices such as smartphones, cameras and computers for use in the US. The agency says about 75% of all US electronics are tested in China and plans to adopt a streamlined approval process for devices [...] The post US-China tech split deepens appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail .

more.title: Britney Spears Pleads Guilty to Lesser DUI Charge, Avoids Jail in California Case
more.description: VENTURA, Calif. (AP) – Pop star Britney Spears has pleaded guilty through her attorney to a reduced charge in a driving-under-the-influence case, allowing her to avoid additional jail time after prosecutors in California accused her of driving under the influence of alcohol and drugs. The 44-year-old singer did not appear in court on Monday in [...] The post Britney Spears Pleads Guilty to Lesser DUI Charge, Avoids Jail in California Case appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail .

more.title: Dolly Parton cancels Las Vegas residency due to health issues: ‘Everything I have is treatable’
more.description: NEW YORK — Dolly Parton has canceled her previously postponed Las Vegas residency due to health challenges that leave her feeling “swimmy headed” — but has assured fans her ailments are treatable. “The good news is I’m responding really well to meds and treatments and I’m improving every day,” the 80-year-old country superstar said in [...] The post Dolly Parton cancels Las Vegas residency due to health issues: ‘Everything I have is treatable’ appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail .

more.title: Counterfeit goods flood Zimbabwe
